name: code-clip
description: Monitor and auto-clean code snippets from the clipboard by removing line numbers, fixing indentation, and stripping Markdown fences.
intent_triggers: 清理剪貼簿裡的程式碼
幫我去掉複製來的行號
監控剪貼簿自動格式化
把 Markdown code fence 去掉
remove line numbers from pasted code
watch the clipboard and auto-format code
convert tabs to spaces in copied code
strip Markdown fences from agent output
幫我處理從 Agent 對話複製的程式碼

file.description: Input file path instead of clipboard

eol.description: Line ending style: lf or crlf

examples.intent: 清理剪貼簿中的程式碼
從檔案讀取並清理 Python 程式碼
持續監控剪貼簿並自動清理

error_codes.1: Clipboard is empty or not accessible
